summary: A superb matrix recording of the June 22 1974 Miami show that shines with a scorching China Cat → Rider segue and a powerhouse Playin’ jam.
review: The four fan reviews unanimously hail this performance as one of the Dead’s finest, singling out Jerry Garcia’s inspired playing, the electrifying China Cat > Rider transition, and an intense Playin’ jam. The matrix source (soundboard blended with audience) is described as crystal‑clear and perfectly balanced, delivering a vivid sense of the sweltering Miami venue while preserving the band’s loose, joyous groove.

ai_rating.rationale: All four reviewers gave five‑star ratings and praised both the musical performance (standout songs, Jerry’s playing) and the recording (perfect matrix mix), indicating an exceptional show with excellent audio quality.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviews call the sound “perfect,” “crisp,” and a seamless blend of pre‑FM SBD with Jerry Moore’s audience overlay, delivering clear instrument separation and vivid crowd ambience.

show_quality.setlist_flow: The set flows with a relaxed, beach‑ball groove, highlighted by a mountainous China Cat transition into Rider and an intense Playin’ jam that keeps the energy soaring throughout.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Repeatedly praised for pure tone, inspired performance, and carrying the show from start to finish.
